summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of GURU FOODS NZ marketing website. All core functionality working perfectly including navigation, WhatsApp CTAs, mobile responsiveness, and image loading.
passed_tests: Hero section loads with correct WhatsApp CTA (https://wa.me/64221299323)
Sticky WhatsApp button visible and links correctly
All 5 navigation links work and scroll to correct sections (#products, #why-us, #inspiration, #about, #contact)
Products section displays all 4 products (Fresh Paneer, Creamy Yoghurt, Fresh Cream, Ginger Paste)
All product WhatsApp enquiry CTAs link correctly with product-specific messages
Mobile menu toggle works correctly on mobile screens
All 11 WhatsApp buttons link to correct URL with proper security attributes (target='_blank', rel='noopener noreferrer')
All 14 images have proper alt text for accessibility
Mobile responsiveness works across desktop (1920x1080), tablet (768x1024), and mobile (390x844)
Desktop navigation hides properly on mobile devices
Mobile menu closes after clicking navigation links
Section scrolling works for all navigation links
Footer WhatsApp button and contact buttons work correctly
Where to Buy section WhatsApp CTA works
Contact section WhatsApp and wholesale enquiry buttons work
